name: 隱忍女主＋隱藏實力型
description: Ashley表面被壓迫、被迫替嫁、甚至被當女傭使喚，但實際身份是歐洲頂級調香師Victoria。她隱忍是為了保護父親，但關鍵時刻絕不退縮，兼具溫柔與剛強。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Tristan may be blind, but he's a genuine, honest man. You, however, have darkness in your heart, even standing in the sunlight. / Yes, I have many identities. You may be familiar with Victoria, but you can also call me by my real name, Ashley Green.
examples.context: Ashley表面被壓迫、被迫替嫁、甚至被當女傭使喚，但實際身份是歐洲頂級調香師Victoria。她隱忍是為了保護父親，但關鍵時刻絕不退縮，兼具溫柔與剛強。
